mapper.select: select id,order_id,request_item_id,material_id,material_code, material_name,specification,unit,order_number,unit_price,remark, line_amount,arrived_number,inbound_number,sort_number,remark,create_time, update_time,deleted from purchase_order_item where order_id=#{orderId} and deleted = 0 order by sort_number asc, id asc
